requirements.heading: General Requirements
notes: Choose one lower division Native American Studies course.
Choose five upper division Native American Studies courses.

UC Davis students should take at least two courses from UC Davis faculty to earn a minor. With approval of an advisor, UC Davis students may take some or the rest of their classes via the NAS/AIS/NAIS courses offered via UC Online from any campus in the system.

Students from other campuses may also consult their departmental advisors about counting UC Online courses towards their regular degrees if NAS, AIS, or NAIS majors or minors are offered at their universities
